supporting_quote: VCaP cells ... were treated with 4 uM modified oligonucleotide by electroporation. ... SPDEF RNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time RTPCR. Human primer probe set RTS35007 was used to measure RNA levels. SPDEF RNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: Cell-line assay (VCaP, RTS35007/RTS35575) normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. Cyclophilin A (HTS3936) is used separately for in-vivo mouse studies, not the cell-line knockdown data.

supporting_quote: PNPLA3 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented as percent inhibition of PNPLA3, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Human primer probe sets RTS36070/RTS36075. No housekeeping-gene normalization; total RNA via RIBOGREEN.

supporting_quote: GHR mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented as percent inhibition of GHR, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Human primer probe set RTS3437. Total RNA via RIBOGREEN; no housekeeping gene.

supporting_quote: SK-MEL-28 cells were treated with modified oligonucleotide ... by electroporation ... PLP1 RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R).
notes: Cell-line assay (SK-MEL-28, RTS35092) normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. Mouse GAPDH (mGapdh_LTS00102) appears only for in-vivo PBS-control mouse studies; 'human GAPDH' appears only in the boilerplate chemical-description term list (not an assay).

supporting_quote: DMPK RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented as percent of DMPK RNA, relative to untreated control cells (% UTC).
notes: Cell-line assay (A431, RTS38095/RTS38096) normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. Mouse GAPDH (mGapdh_LTS00102) is used only for in-vivo mouse studies normalized to PBS control, not the A431 cell-line data.
